matcher_value: $a=Get-CimInstance Win32_PhysicalMemoryArray;$m=Get-CimInstance Win32_PhysicalMemory;$result = [ordered]@{  Array = [ordered]@{    Slots = (($a | Measure-Object -Property MemoryDevices -Sum).Sum);    MaxCapacityGiB = [math]::Round((((($a | Measure-Object -Property MaxCapacityEx -Sum).Sum) * 1KB) / 1GB), 2)  };  Modules = @($m | Select-Object     DeviceLocator,    BankLabel,    @{N='SizeGiB';E={[math]::Round($_.Capacity/1GB,2)}},    Manufacturer,    PartNumber,    SerialNumber,    ConfiguredClockSpeed,    Speed,    SMBIOSMemoryType,    FormFactor  )};$result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4
